POS AS TO THANYARAT RICH OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE; NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS; CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE RE: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE; NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF TODD RICH IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
NOTICE AND MOTION TO AMEND CLAIM PURSUANT TP CCP 473, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT RICH, TODD HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT RICH, TODD'S MOTION TO AMEND CLAIM PURSUANT TO CCP 473 IS CONTINUED FROM FEB-10-2010 TO LAW AND MOTION MAR-24-2010, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES.

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT TODD RICH'S MOTION TO AMEND CLAIM PURSUANT TO CCP 473 IS DENIED; RESPONDENT'S ERROR IN FAILING TO RESPOND TO THE MOTION TO STRIKE WOULD REQUIRE FILING A RESPONSE TO THAT MOTION, AND SECTION 473 REQUIRES THAT SUCH A RESPONSIVE PLEADING BE ATTACHED TO THE PAPERS ON THIS MOTION FOR RELIEF, BUT IT IS NOT. IT WOULD NOT BE PROPER, EVEN IF RELIEF WERE OTHERWISE AVAILABLE, TO TREAT THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS IF RESPONDENT HAD DEFEATED IT. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF TODD RICH

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Amend Claim Pursuant Tp Ccp 473
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
RESPONDENT TODD RICH'S Motion To Amend Claim Pursuant To C C P 473 IS DENIED; RESPONDENT'S ERROR IN FAILING TO RESPOND TO THE MOTION TO STRIKE WOULD REQUIRE FILING A RESPONSE TO THAT MOTION, AND SECTION 473 REQUIRES THAT SUCH A RESPONSIVE PLEADING BE ATTACHED TO THE PAPERS ON THIS MOTION FOR RELIEF, BUT IT IS NOT. IT WOULD NOT BE PROPER, EVEN IF RELIEF WERE OTHERWISE AVAILABLE, TO TREAT THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS IF RESPONDENT HAD DEFEATED IT. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Notice And Motion To Amend Claim Pursuant Tp Ccp 473
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Continued To Mar-24-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strke The Claim Of Todd Rich;
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - TODD RICH, CLAIMANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike The Claim Of Todd Rich IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
